name: Nemr
blurb: He grew up between San Diego and Beirut, and his 2017 special No Bombing in Beirut, filmed in Lebanon and Los Angeles, premiered on Showtime.
bio: Nemr is a Lebanese-American stand-up comedian credited with pioneering the stand-up scene across the Middle East, where he performs in English. He grew up between San Diego and Beirut, and his 2017 special No Bombing in Beirut, filmed in Lebanon and Los Angeles, premiered on Showtime.

timeline.ev: Turns to stand-up professionally after the 2006 Lebanon War
Featured on the cover of Rolling Stone Middle East
Special No Bombing in Beirut premieres on Showtime
Tours Love Isnt the Answer worldwide
Tours the Dropping Hot world tour

accolades: Pioneer of stand-up comedy in the Middle East
Cover of Rolling Stone Middle East (2014)
Showtime stand-up special No Bombing in Beirut

bits.yt_title: NEMR - PTSD (Stand Up Comedy-No Bombing in Beirut)
